features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: The rat has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the rat's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 feet. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Swarm Fighter - Pack hunter with climbing ability
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Pack Tactics when fighting alongside allies
tactical_info.damage_output: 5 piercing per hit with advantage when allies are nearby
tactical_info.key_abilities: Pack Tactics makes groups of rats dangerous
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent in groups, can climb to flank enemies
